## 🧪 Testing Checklist

Before submitting this PR, confirm you have:

- [ ] Ran `npm test` on both `client` and `server` — all tests pass
- [ ] Ran `npm run build` on `server` — no TypeScript errors
- [ ] Ran `npm run build` on `client` — production build succeeds
- [ ] Manually tested the affected UI flows in the browser
- [ ] Tested with multiple user roles (DIRECTOR, IT, ADMIN, STAFF) if applicable
